summary: Iteration 8 UI Overhaul testing complete. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified all new features working: Admin Dashboard has 9 tabs including new Credentials, Counsellors, and improved Badges tabs. Teacher Dashboard shows 'Classes of the Day' and grouped student view with search. Wallet page shows correct green/red colors for credits/debits.

code_quality.issue: Nested button elements (feedback button inside toggle button) causing React hydration warning
Span inside option element in badge user select causing hydration warning

backend: GET /api/admin/all-users - Admin can list all users (200)
POST /api/admin/reset-password - Admin can reset user password (200)
GET /api/admin/user-detail/{user_id} - Admin can view user details (200)
GET /api/admin/badge-templates - Admin can list badge templates (200)
POST /api/admin/badge-template - Admin can create badge template (200)
GET /api/admin/counsellor-tracking - Admin can view counsellor stats (200)
GET /api/teacher/grouped-classes - Teacher gets grouped student view (200)
frontend: Admin Dashboard loads with all 9 tabs visible
Admin Credentials tab: Password reset form visible (email, password, button)
Admin Credentials tab: User search input visible and functional
Admin Credentials tab: User detail dialog opens on click
Admin Badges tab: Badge template creation form visible
Admin Badges tab: Badge assignment form visible (dropdown + custom input)
Admin Badges tab: Existing templates displayed with delete option
Admin Counsellors tab: Shows counsellor tracking cards with stats
Teacher Dashboard: 'Classes of the Day' section visible
Teacher Dashboard: 'My Students' grouped view section visible
Teacher Dashboard: Student search input visible and functional
Teacher Dashboard: All action buttons visible (Create Class, Demo Live Sheet, Wallet, Learning Kit, All Classes, My Complaints)
Teacher Dashboard: Feedback button visible on student groups
Wallet Page: Green '+' for credits (emerald color)

critical_code_review_comments: TeacherDashboard.js line 365: Nested button elements cause React hydration warning - consider using div with onClick instead of Button inside button
AdminDashboard.js line 575: Span inside option element causes hydration warning - use plain text in option elements

features_verified.admin_credentials_tab: WORKING - Password reset form, user search, user detail dialog
features_verified.admin_badges_tab: WORKING - Create template, view templates, assign badge (dropdown or custom)
features_verified.admin_counsellors_tab: WORKING - Shows counsellor tracking with assignment stats
features_verified.teacher_classes_of_day: WORKING - Shows today's classes in dedicated section
features_verified.teacher_grouped_students: WORKING - Students grouped with expandable class lists

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 UI overhaul features fully tested and working. Admin Dashboard now has 9 tabs (Teachers, Add Student, Classes, Proofs, Transactions, Complaints, Badges, Credentials, Counsellors). Teacher Dashboard shows 'Classes of the Day' and grouped student view with search. Wallet page correctly shows green for credits and red for debits. Minor code quality issues: nested buttons in TeacherDashboard and span in option in AdminDashboard cause React hydration warnings but don't affect functionality.
